summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX admin panel header layout fix. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Admin and user login functional. Header spacing between title and ECOMMBX badge is correct (16px). However, CRITICAL ISSUE FOUND: Bell icon is NOT positioned in far right corner as required - it's placed immediately after ECOMMBX badge with 0px gap instead of being pushed to far right with flex-1 spacer.

ui_bugs.issue: Bell icon NOT in far right corner - positioned immediately after ECOMMBX badge
ui_bugs.details: The flex-1 spacer exists in HTML but has 0px width. Bell should be pushed to far right of header but instead has 0px gap from badge. Expected: [Title] [Badge] ... [large space] ... [Bell]. Actual: [Title] [Badge][Bell]

passed_tests: Header bar present with all elements
Title to badge spacing correct (16px ml-4)
Dropdown shows 4 notification items (KYC, Cards, Transfers, Tickets)
Mark All as Read button works
Users tab loads with user table
Edit IBAN button present in Accounts
Card Requests Queue tab loads with PENDING filter

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Bell icon positioning in admin header
action_item_for_main_agent.description: The bell icon is NOT positioned in the far right corner of the header as required. It's placed immediately after the ECOMMBX badge with 0px gap. The flex-1 spacer exists in the code but has 0px width and is not functioning.
action_item_for_main_agent.required_fix: Fix the flex-1 spacer in the header layout so the bell icon is pushed to the far right corner of the header. The current layout shows [Title][Badge][Bell] but should show [Title][Badge]...[large space]...[Bell]
action_item_for_main_agent.current_code_structure:
The header has:
[Title][Badge]
[Bell]
action_item_for_main_agent.expected_behavior: Bell should be at far right edge of header with large gap from badge
action_item_for_main_agent.actual_behavior: Bell is immediately after badge with 0px gap, spacer has 0px width
action_item_for_main_agent.testing_evidence: Measurements show: Badge ends at 448px, Spacer 448-448px (0px), Bell starts at 448px. Container width is 256px but header width is 1680px, suggesting container measurement issue.
